samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="size">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Extend input signals.</description>
        <parameter name="length">size</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_a">mul_a</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_b">mul_b</parameter>
        <parameter name="output">ext_a or ext_b</parameter>
        <parameter name="operation">assign</parameter>
        <parameter name="value">input_a or input_b</parameter>
        <parameter name="extension">size{1'b0}</parameter>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Generate partial products.</description>
        <parameter name="i">loop variable</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_a">ext_a</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_b">ext_b</parameter>
        <parameter name="operation">assign</parameter>
        <parameter name="value">i?input_a<<i:'d0</parameter>
        <parameter name="output">pp[i]</parameter>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Generate pp_mux.</description>
        <parameter name="i">loop variable</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_a">pp[i-1]</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_b">pp[i]</parameter>
        <parameter name="operation">assign</parameter>
        <parameter name="value">i?input_a+input_b:'d0</parameter>
        <parameter name="output">pp_mux[i]</parameter>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Generate pp_reg.</description>
        <parameter name="i">loop variable</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_a">pp_mux[i-1]</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_b">pp_mux[i]</parameter>
        <parameter name="operation">assign</parameter>
        <parameter name="value">i?input_a+input_b:'d0</parameter>
        <parameter name="output">pp_reg[i]</parameter>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate the final product.</description>
        <parameter name="i">loop variable</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_a">pp_reg[i-1]</parameter>
        <parameter name="input_b">pp_reg[i]</parameter>
        <parameter name="operation">assign</parameter>
        <parameter name="value">i?input_a+input_b:'d0</parameter>
        <parameter name="output">mul_out</parameter>
    </task>
    </implementation>
</module>
